Declares a global function for JavaScript assertions in the JerryScript mbed environment.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a global function `assert` for use within the JerryScript and mbed environment. It includes two other header files: `wrap_tools.h` and `logging.h`, which are part of the JerryScript mbed library registry and utility logging, respectively. The `DECLARE_GLOBAL_FUNCTION(assert);` macro is used to declare the `assert` function globally, making it available for use in other parts of the program. The file is protected against multiple inclusions by the include guard `_JERRYSCRIPT_MBED_DRIVERS_ASSERT_H`.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/wrap_tools.h`
- `jerryscript-mbed-util/logging.h`
